scripts.build:css: mkdir -p dist .tmp && sass src/styles/theme.scss .tmp/theme.css --no-source-map && npx tailwindcss -i .tmp/theme.css -o dist/styles.css --minify
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run stamp:assets
scripts.watch:css: mkdir -p dist .tmp && sass --watch src/styles/theme.scss:.tmp/theme.css & npx tailwindcss -i .tmp/theme.css -o dist/styles.css --watch
